subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Kingdom! Thou wast not alone in the trip thou didst undertake in various places. The spirit and soul of Abdul-Baha was with thee.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی ملکوت در سفری که باطراف رفتی تنها نبودی جان و دل عبدالبهاء با تو بود
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
